entry.title: Re: abap cds view: joins with one table on multiple condi...
entry.content: Hi keremkoseoglu, so that the solution is in aliases. Thanks, it works.

entry.title: Re: How to rename "Total" in SAC story
entry.content:
Hi ,

Currently, the "Total" label cannot be renamed directly in the row or column using the user interface settings. SAC does not offer an override option for that in standard tables because it is a system-generated label.

Hope it clarifies.

regards,

G

entry.title: Include Contingent Worker should be selected automatically
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Is there any feasibility to keep Contingent Worker should be selected automatically selected rather we have to select it from the Gear always.

This is regarding the update 1H 2025 - Options to Hide Contingent Workers in the Latest Org Chart

Thanks

Ashish

entry.title: Re: CDS view for revenue forecast in sap pubcli cloud
entry.content: Thank you Chuma for your time.. Unfortunately, the CDS I_RevenuePlanItemCube is not available for us to use.. may i know is it released? Even i am not able to find in link: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/c0c54048d35849128be8e872df5bea6d/9c2497b6557a45788a1efdc151758c75.html

entry.title: Re: How can I skip the maintenance request screening step?
entry.content:
Hello @simon_all4cloud ,

With the current version of SAP S/4HANA Cloud public edition, the screening step cannot be skipped for Y1 and Y2 maintenance notification types but the possibility to accept/reject the maintenance notifications in mass via background job is something that is on the roadmap. 

SAP Road Map Explorer

Hope this helps.

BR,

Vijayalaxmi Melavanki

entry.title: How to block anyone from accessing the BTP outside a particular geo-location
entry.content:
Our usecase:
Allow the use of BTP(business as well as platform users) only within a specified IP range(Geo-location). 
Challenge
When we try to use RBA(risk based authentication) in the Cloud Identity Services, we need to create a rule for each IP range(CIDR). This is not practical as we have nearly a million records and creating a rule for each record is impractical. Also there is no excel upload option.

entry.title: Re: How to hide "Totals" for specific measure
entry.content:
Hi,

You can select the particular measure total column then right popup appears and use hide column.

regards

G

entry.title: Country COA for Morocco
entry.content:
Hi SAP,

We are rolling out a company in Morocco. There is a requirement to build country COA for Morocco. I checked the link to create a country COA. https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0fa84c9d9c634132b7c4abb9ffdd8f06/555752c222fa48558a374b7fc8228f08.html?q=alternative+account

Is there any way to copy a reference country COA that similar to Morocco? Thank you.

entry.title: SAP Mobile Start - Cannot load external app
entry.content:
I create a mobile start app in SAP Build Workzone, standard edition.

I created a simple app which directs to a Myntra shopping app. I am able to see this app in Mobile but i get a error as "can not load an external app" when launching from Mobile Start.

I followed the below blog to implement this in my trial account

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blog-posts-by-members/sap-mobile-start-demo/ba-p/13555956

Please help to resolve this issue

entry.title: Re: How to hide "Totals" for specific measure
entry.content: Thanks for your comment. However, when I try to hide the column, it removes the entire column—including the "Carrying Amount for Non-financial corporations", which I still want to display.

entry.title: Re: Copy Table from query manager does not copy all the rows
entry.content:
Looking at the actual data, you appear to have the same lines in both. What about the top lines? In other words, if data is not being copied, is it data from the top, the middle or the end?

P.S. I could not reproduce this (n.b. 1 difference for the title row):

entry.title: Re: Error in classic story conversion of "Root path missi...
entry.content:
Hi,

At first please take copy of the classic story and perform as a safer approach. because few features are not yet supported in optimized.  assuming you have taken backup. following may be the root cause of the

error :

  • One of the hierarchies used in your story (especially in filters, input controls, or tables) does not have a properly defined root node.

  • The dimension hierarchy in the model has missing or circular parent-child mappings, which makes it invalid or incomplete when ODE tries to process it.

Regards,

G

entry.title: Re: How to add a Excel-File to an existing Dataset (UNION)
entry.content: In my GUI there is no Edit Option in the Data-Management. The 3 points are missing. What am I doing wrong? I have the system-owner rights. Am I using a wrong version?

entry.title: Re: Chart of Depreciation
entry.content:
Thanks @sumesh_gupta, so is it correct to say that,
CoD - Contains the hierarchy of Depreciation Area and Depreciation Keys and how a depreciation will work in a particular company code and on its assets.
Depreciation Area - Could differentiate on the basis of accounting principle or the country.
Depreciation Key - Helps to define the method of Depreciation like SLM or WDV.

entry.title: Re: ECC Inbound delivery was not found in EWM system
entry.content:
Hi Vincent,

Please make sure correct logical system name S4FCLNT210 is maintained in BD54.

I noticed in the error message that there's an extra space in the logical system name.

Also, please look into SAP KBA 1914811 - You transfer data from your ECC to your SCM System and you get the error message SR053? What does that mean? for more information on the error.

Regards,

Manoj Somkuwar

entry.title: Is it possible to attach a document in output parameter determination without using a form template?
entry.content: Is it possible to send out attachments using output parameter determination without using a form template? We have a static PDF we want to send out and have no need to generate this with a form template - we just want to upload it from our system and send it out. Is this possible?

entry.title: Re: Copy Table from query manager does not copy all the rows
entry.content:
Thank you for your response @Johan_Hakkesteegt 

Total rows displayed in SAP B1 Query Manager: 47,966

Total rows pasted into Excel using "Copy Table": 47,937

So, 29 rows are missing after pasting. I checked and both the first and last rows in SAP B1 appear in Excel, so it seems like the missing rows are somewhere in the middle of the data.

Has anyone experienced this before? Could this be a limitation or a bug in version 10.0 FP 2202?

entry.title: Re: Pricing error: Mandatory condition UTXJ is missing
entry.content: check the analysis in the condition tab for the condition type UTXJ in va21 or check if you have maintain Condition record or not.

entry.title: Re: How to add a Excel-File to an existing Dataset (UNION)
entry.content: I guess you still using the classic account model where replace data source is not supported. I would suggest you to convert your model to new model type is possible.

entry.title: Re: If there any documents about S/4HANA Material Master...
entry.content: Many thanks Dominik, seems it is about Virtual Data Model of CDS view, in this case, customer want to check the data dictionary level table with field list.

entry.title: SAP OData WebService DataModel for CREATE-Operation - Am i doing this the intended way?
entry.content:
I am currently working on a project to upgrade existing SAP Function Models from external RFC to OData Rest-Services.

Certain things are set:

  • it has to be OData and REST
  • the interface has to be as close to the original as possible

The given Function Model has the followong architecture:

  • IMPORT
    • iv_testrun type BOOL
  • EXPORT
    • es_return like BAPIRET2
  • TABLES
    • IT_TIMETICKETS
    • ET_DETAIL_RETURN

The function model works relativly easy:

  • IMPORT is self-explanatory
  • EXPORT is given if something goes wrong which kills the processing
  • TABLES
    • the timetickets which shall be created to an existing order
    • the detailed return gives a message for each given ticket if the creation was succesfull or not and some details what went wrong

Knowing my way around the SEGW and the DPC, DPC_EXT, MPC, MPC_EXT -Classes i designed a webservice with a deep_entity setup.

  1. i created a KEY-Entity with a literal Key called ConfCreate to later connect the importing Values to.
  2. i created the VALUE-Entity which has basically all the inputs of IT_TIMETICKETS. This i connecte via an association with the KEY-Entity settings set on 1 to M.
  3. To get the detailed results i went in my opinion a bit sketchi... i created a third entity called RETURN. this on i also connected to the KEY-Entity with an association.

so overall the segw looks something like this:

and the associations look like this:

lastly i redefined the CREATE_DEEP_ENTITY Method of the DPC_EXT and voilà, it works...
...but its kind of ugly and it feels "done in the wrong way"

so this is the request:

{
  "Testrun": "",
  "Values": {
    "results": [
      {
        "ConfNo": "1",
        "Orderid": "",
        "Operation": "",
        "SubOper": "",
        "CapaCategory": ""
      },
      {
        "ConfNo": "2",
        "Orderid": "",
        "Operation": "",
        "SubOper": "",
        "CapaCategory": ""
      }
    ]
  },
  "Returns": []
}

ConfCreate is, as already explained, the "link" to the Value-Entries.
Testrun defines if it´s a testrun or not. Since both have to be adressable i defined them as KEYS.
And in Values, we have the timeticket-values which we can give noumerous at once into the service.

... And then there is results ... 
this is left blank because it is needed to be automatically in the tech_clauses, which is a string_table defining what goes in AND comes out.

If there should be a general error we get a 40X or 50X http status and if there is a business wrongdoing we get the results filled as intended

this is an example response:

[...]
    "Returns": {
      "results": [
        {
          "__metadata": {
            "id": "https://.../sap/opu/odata/sap/Z...CONF_CREATE_SRV_01/ReturnSet(ConfCreate='',Testrun='')",
            "uri": "https://.../sap/opu/odata/sap/Z...CONF_CREATE_SRV_01/ReturnSet(ConfCreate='',Testrun='')",
            "type": "Z...CONF_CREATE_SRV_01.Return"
          },
          "ConfCreate": "",
          "Testrun": "",
          "Type": "E",
          "MessageId": "RU",
          "MessageNumber": "020",
          "Message": "Rückmeldenr. 1 nicht vorhanden (Bitte Eingabe prüfen)",
          "LogNumber": "",
          "LogMsgNo": "000000",
          "MessageV1": "1",
          "MessageV2": "",
          "MessageV3": "",
          "MessageV4": "",
          "Parameter": "",
          "Row": 1,
          "Field": "",
          "System": "A05_010",
          "FlgLocked": false,
          "ConfNo": "0000000000",
          "ConfCnt": "00000000"
        },
        {
          "__metadata": {
            "id": "https://.../sap/opu/odata/sap/Z...CONF_CREATE_SRV_01/ReturnSet(ConfCreate='',Testrun='')",
            "uri": "https://.../sap/opu/odata/sap/Z...CONF_CREATE_SRV_01/ReturnSet(ConfCreate='',Testrun='')",
            "type": "Z...CONF_CREATE_SRV_01.Return"
          },
          "ConfCreate": "",
          "Testrun": "",
          "Type": "E",
          "MessageId": "RU",
          "MessageNumber": "020",
          "Message": "Rückmeldenr. 2 nicht vorhanden (Bitte Eingabe prüfen)",
          "LogNumber": "",
          "LogMsgNo": "000000",
          "MessageV1": "2",
          "MessageV2": "",
          "MessageV3": "",
          "MessageV4": "",
          "Parameter": "",
          "Row": 2,
          "Field": "",
          "System": "A05_010",
          "FlgLocked": false,
          "ConfNo": "0000000000",
          "ConfCnt": "00000000"
        }
      ]
    }
  }
}

so now we come to my question:

Is this really the intended way of solving sth like this?

Is there a more fitting configuration and setup hidden inside the SEGW i do not know yet?

So please, if someone is experienced with mass-creates and explicit returns for each individual create please let me know.

 

Kind Regards
Mirco

I checked the "manage flavors" fiori/gui application and it does not allow me to assign users in mass to the new flavor. Your help will be appreciated

entry.title: Re: Triggering a CPI process from SuccessFactors Intelligent Services
entry.content:
Hi,

is that mandatory to upload wsdl file at soap sender adapter ? if yes, im unable to get the wsdl file. what you've provided is showing not found page.

and also im getting error when im saving the configuration in ISC.

"Your changes were successfully saved.
Please check the credentials provided because the endpoint couldn’t be connected using the same."

Could you pls help me?

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori Elements vs. Freestyle Apps: When to Use What
entry.content:
Consider a simple development going live as a Fiori Elements app, but new requirements turn out to be so complex that freestyle seems to be unavoidable. Developers have to re-write already tested and working parts, and management is frustrated. The same risk can occur in managed vs unmanaged RAP developments.

I don't mean to ignore YAGNI and imply that freestyle / unmanaged should be used in all cases, but picking the simple solution shouldn't turn into technical debt either.

entry.title: Re: MFA setup for SAP PO/PI risks
entry.content:
Hi Ramu

in my security understanding the MFA is nowadays state of the art if you have websites for user interaction that can be reached in the cloud (e.g.  cloud integration).  As I assume your  PI/PO system is hosted on premise and monitoring and admin URLs are only reached if you are connected via VPN - you have already reached 1st factor (you have VPN credentials) - so basic authentication on PI/PO is okey. However, it can be easily connected via SSO that you use your Active Directory Certificate that gives extra security.

When talking about integrated services - if they are from outside you need somewhere a reverse proxy or API-M. If you have already integration suite, i would recommend to use API-M to make all security checks. Otherwise install as a reverse proxy but also include a WAF (web application firewall) that is checking and filtering un-wished requests.

BR Helmut

entry.title: Re: Leveraging Linear Regression in SAP AI: Predicting Business Outcomes with Data Science
entry.content: Very well conceptualised! However it is written... @utkarshibm1

entry.title: Re: End of Maintenance for Basic Authentication
entry.content: Hi team, any update on this? It's not a very difficult or complicate issue, just want to know the correct date and when the date shown on login page will be correct. thank you

entry.title: Re: SSL Handshake error
entry.content:
Try XPI Inspector  Https://host:port/xpi_inspector/index.jsp

here you get more details on what is missing/wrong.

Important - if the certificate chain is :
ROOT CA --> Intermediate CA --> Server CERT   
it's enough to trust ROOT CA

if the certificate chain is:
ROOT CA --> Intermediate 1 CA --> Intermediate 2 CA --> Server CERT
you cannot trust ROOT CA alone. You can trust intermediate 1 as far as i have observed.

entry.title: Re: AI-Powered SAP Fiori App Generation from Images
entry.content: Thanks Rai.

entry.title: Re: Missing Data in UPL
entry.content: What is the object type? Like Transaction, Program, Include, Method, Function Module etc.

entry.title: Re: Copy Table from query manager does not copy all the rows
entry.content:
A couple of things you could try:

  • Save your query, close and reopen the B1 client. Surprisingly often this will solve this kind of weird phenomenon.
  • In Excel add filters at the top and check that you have the expected numbers of columns -> perhaps some rows were pasted next to each other. Possibly because of a special character in one of the values.
  • If that is not the case, you could try adding a running number in the query, with the ROW_NUMBER function. Something like this:
select ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY X.[some field or fields here]) AS row_nr
,*
from
( your query here ) X

Now when you copy this query result to Excel, you can check where the row number from the query result starts to deviate from the row number in Excel.

entry.title: Re: Webinar Series Recap : Enable a Clean Core with SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content: Hi @shruthi_Jayaram - is it possible for you to share the presentations which were used in these sessions?

entry.title: Re: Set field Read only in Restful Application Programming when creating record
entry.content: Hello Edrilan, I had recently a similar requirement to the one in this blog (to make a custom field read only in the standard Sales Order V2 Fiori tile) and it worked by extending the standard Behavior definition with the "field ( read only ) YY1_..." statement. I have a question though. What if, my custom field needs to be made read only based on a specific rule and made available based on another rule? In this case the "field ( read only ) ..." won't work anymore. Do you know how to implement such requirement ? (I would like to avoid adding a logic to check if the field is maintained or not, at the SAVE operation or at a BAdI SAVE operation). Thank you

entry.title: Re: Chart of Depreciation
entry.content: Yes Karthikay this is correct understanding.

entry.title: Re: Problem with authorization objects in G/L account bal...
entry.content: Problem was solved with SAP note 3588573

entry.title: Re: If there any documents about S/4HANA Material Master...
entry.content: As far as I know there is no official documentation on the data model on DB tables level. That is the idea of the virtual data model - to abstract from DB technicalities and provide customers with something more semantically oriented.

entry.title: PIR not consumed by goods issue in Strategy group 11
entry.content:
Hi SAP MRP Guru,

Business case is:  MRP PR is triggered only by LSF.

In testing system it goes well with this design:

1.MRP type:PD  Lot size: EX   Bulk is set 

2.MRP3 view: 

3. MD61- LSF

4. GI done: GI quantity has been consumed in LSF 

 

 

Issue in Production system: GI is not deducted from LSF

GI of 30 in 2 transactions: May, 08 and May. 13 *after latest PIR update

There is no update/reduction of PIR.

Below shows the PIR was 407 since May.07. 2025 

 

Troubleshooting: compared all configuration on Requirement class, requirement type 

Please kindly advise what are the possible cause for this failure of PIR consumption.

Many thanks,

Sally

entry.title: Re: Advanced Intercompany Sales & Stock Transfer in SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
So, Which release of S/4 HANA OP/PCE can be available for 7DM - Advanced Intercompany Sales - Make-to-Order and Variant Config?
thank you!

entry.title: Extract SAP Ariba data into SAP Signavio Process Intelligence using SAP Integration Suite
entry.content:
Overview

To achieve end-to-end digital procurement transformation, we at Signavio aim to cover the whole process and IT landscape of our customers, comprising SAP, SAP Ariba as well as external systems.

I am happy to share the release of our out-of-the-box content for SAP Ariba connectivity to SAP Signavio Process Intelligence that you can use to perform process mining analysis on end-to-end procurement processes.

 

Let’s jointly explore where you can find the data extractor content and how to use it.

First, launch the SAP Business Accelerator hub at API.SAP.COM, and navigate to SAP Signavio.

Then select the SAP Ariba integration:

Next, select the SAP Ariba API Extractor for SAP Signavio Process Intelligence.

A brief overview sketches the purpose of this data extractor. Once, navigated to the “Integration Flow” tab, the following view appears:

 

For each of these integration flows, more information such as configuration file templates, user manuals and change logs are available for download. For illustration, the sceenshot below shows the information flow of the Data Extractor.

Install Data Extractor in SAP Integration Suite

If this Data Extractor meets your goals, log into the SAP Integration and navigate to “Discover/Integration”.

 

In this search window, search for “Ariba API”, and the new Cloud integration Data Extractor will appear.

Once you select the package “SAP Ariba API Extractor for Signavio Process Intelligence”, more information regarding the included objects is provided.

To install the package, just click on “Copy” to transfer the package in our design area for configuration and deployment.

If this step is completed: Congratulations, the new package is installed. Finally, connect the pipelines in Process Intelligence with the Data Extractor and enjoy analysing your SAP Ariba processes in SAP Signavio Process Intelligence.

 

To get you started, here some further links:

SAP Signavio on SAP Business Accelerator Hub

Content: SAP Ariba Integration with SAP Signavio Process Intelligence

entry.title: Re: Contact person does not update correct based on LINENUM
entry.content:
Hi sheetalpanchal ,

Can you confirm how you are verifying the LineNum?

You should use the following query:

SELECT * FROM OCPR WHERE "CardCode" = <CardCode you want to update> Order By "CardCode", "CntctCode"

To update the Contact Employee, you need to fill the LineNum in the ContactEmployee import file from the results of above query. The first line returned from the query will get a LineNum of 0, the second line returned gets the LineNum 1, and so on.

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: When in H1 2025, they refer to Manager remove admin assigned learning.
entry.content:
All the documentation I have read refers to Admin Assigned Learning is this specifically things assigned through the ADMIN UI ‘Manage User Learning -> Manage Assignments’.

I want to ensure Managers won't be able to unassign anything assigned via an Assignment Profile?

entry.title: AEAD is not getting disabled
entry.content: Even after disabling the AEAD, when we are checking by gpg --list-packets <filename> still it exists, it is showing as prefix for AEAD as O2.

entry.title: How to Control the Visibility of CRUD and Custom Actions in Fiori Elements Based on Authorization
entry.content:
1. Introduction

In Fiori elements applications built with CAP, there is often a requirement to control the visibility of buttons such as Create, Edit, or custom actions based on the user's authorization.

While in SAP S/4HANA systems this can be achieved through "Adapt UI" and app variants, as described in this blog post, such options are not available in SAP BTP.

To meet this requirement, we can leverage a combination of annotations, a singleton entity that holds feature control flags, and logic implemented in event handlers.

This blog explains how to implement this approach to achieve dynamic button visibility in Fiori elements applications.

2. About Authorization Control with @restrict

The `@restrict` annotation in CAP allows you to define fine-grained access control for CRUD operations and custom actions based on user roles. While this ensures backend-level security, there is a limitation when using Fiori elements.

Even if a user does not have permission to perform a certain operation (such as Create or Execute Action), the corresponding button is still rendered in the UI. When the user clicks the button, they will encounter a "403 Forbidden" error.

Although the backend restriction works as expected, this experience can be confusing or frustrating for end users. Therefore, combining `@restrict` with UI-level control — such as dynamically hiding or disabling buttons based on authorization — leads to a much better user experience.

service CatalogService {
    .draft.enabled
    @restrict: [{ grant: ['READ','WRITE'], to: 'Admin'},
                { grant: 'READ'}]
    entity Books as projection on my.Books
        actions {
            action updateStock(stock : Integer) returns Books;
        };

    @restrict: [{ to: 'Admin'}]
    action autoFillStock();
}

Authorization Control with `@restrict`

Forbidden Error Displayed When User Lacks Authorization

3. Method for Button Control Based on Authorization

In this section, we will walk through a sample scenario where the visibility and availability of CRUD buttons and custom actions (both bound and unbound) are controlled based on the user's authorization.

Only users with the Admin role can perform these operations. All other users will see limited UI options according to their access level.

3.1. Setup

To implement this control, we will perform the following steps:

  • Define the main entity and custom actions
service CatalogService {
    .draft.enabled
    entity Books as projection on my.Books
        actions {
            action updateStock(stock : Integer) returns Books; // bound action
        };

    //unbound action
    action autoFillStock();
}
  • Create a singleton entity that will act as a container for UI control flags (e.g., whether Create or action buttons should be shown or hidden)
    .singleton
    entity FeatureControl {
        operationHidden : Boolean;
        operationEnabled : Boolean;
    }
  • Implement an event handler that checks the current user's roles and sets the corresponding flags in the singleton entity.
  this.on ('READ', FeatureControl, async (req) => {
    let operationHidden = true

    if (req.user.is('Admin')) {
      operationHidden = false
    }

    return {
      operationHidden: operationHidden,
      operationEnabled: !operationHidden,
    }
  })

3.2. Hiding Buttons Using Annotations

To control the visibility of CRUD buttons and custom actions, we use UI.xxxHidden annotations, combined with dynamic path-based expressions referring to the singleton entity defined in the previous step.

// CRUD operations
annotate CatalogService.Books with @(
    UI.CreateHidden: { $edmJson: { $Path: '/CatalogService.EntityContainer/FeatureControl/operationHidden' } }, 
    UI.UpdateHidden: { $edmJson: { $Path: '/CatalogService.EntityContainer/FeatureControl/operationHidden' } },
    UI.DeleteHidden: { $edmJson: { $Path: '/CatalogService.EntityContainer/FeatureControl/operationHidden' } }
);

To hide custom action buttons, place the UI.Hidden annotation within the UI.LineItem or UI.Identification annotation, depending on where the button is rendered.

annotate CatalogService.Books with @(
    UI.LineItem : [
        ...,
        {
            $Type : 'UI.DataFieldForAction',
            Action : 'CatalogService.updateStock',
            Label : 'Update Stock',
            ![@UI.Hidden]: { $edmJson: { $Path: '/CatalogService.EntityContainer/FeatureControl/operationHidden' }},
        },
        {
            $Type : 'UI.DataFieldForAction',
            Action : 'CatalogService.EntityContainer/autoFillStock',
            Label : 'Auto Fill Stock',
            ![@UI.Hidden]: { $edmJson: { $Path: '/CatalogService.EntityContainer/FeatureControl/operationHidden' }},
        },

This results in the following behavior:

  • When the user has the authorization, buttons are visible.
  • When the user does not have the authorization, buttons are hidden.

3.3. Disabling Buttons (Visible but Inactive)

In some cases, instead of hiding buttons entirely, you may want to display them in the UI but disable them based on the user's authorization—or another condition.

For standard operations like Update and Delete, you can control their availability using `Capabilities.UpdateRestrictions.Updatable` and `Capabilities.DeleteRestrictions.Deletable` annotations.

// CRUD Operations
annotate CatalogService.Books with @(
    Capabilities.UpdateRestrictions: {
        Updatable: { $edmJson: { $Path: '/CatalogService.EntityContainer/FeatureControl/operationEnabled' } }
    },
    Capabilities.DeleteRestrictions: {
        Deletable: { $edmJson: { $Path: '/CatalogService.EntityContainer/FeatureControl/operationEnabled' } }
    }
);

For both bound and unbound actions, the availability can be controlled using the `Core.OperationAvailable` annotation.

// Bound Action
annotate CatalogService.Books with actions {
    updateStock @(
        Core.OperationAvailable: { $edmJson: { $Path: '/CatalogService.EntityContainer/FeatureControl/operationEnabled' } } 
    );
};

// Unbound Action
annotate CatalogService.autoFillStock with @(
    Core.OperationAvailable: { $edmJson: { $Path: '/CatalogService.EntityContainer/FeatureControl/operationEnabled' } } 
);

 This results in the following behavior:

  • When the user has the authorization, buttons are enabled.

    The Delete button is disabled on the List Report but enabled on the Object Page. 

     

  • When the user does not have the authorization, buttons are disabled.

    In this case, the Delete button is also disabled on the Object Page.

     

Known Limitation: $Not Expressions Do Not Work as Expected

Although using $Not to negate a boolean path (e.g., to invert an opererationEnabled flag) may seem straightforward, it currently does not work as expected in Fiori elements. For example, the following annotation will not properly hide the Create button:

UI.CreateHidden : { $edmJson: { $Not: { $Path: '/CatalogService.EntityContainer/FeatureControl/operationEnabled' } } } // Does not work

This is a known limitation, and a related discussion can be found in this SAP Community Q&A thread. As a workaround, handle the negation in your backend logic. Rather than inverting the flag in the annotation, expose a dedicated boolean property (e.g., operationHidden) that already represents the intended value for UI.

4. Conclusion

In this blog post, we explored how to control the visibility and availability of CRUD and action buttons in Fiori elements applications based on user authorization. By combining annotations, a singleton entity, and event handlers, you can provide a more secure and user-friendly UI experience tailored to each user's role.

References

  • Use Roles to Toggle Visibility of UI elements (CAP Documentation)
  • Dynamic CRUD Restrictions (GitHub – fiori-elements-feature-showcase)
  • Enabling Custom Actions Defined Using Annotations (SAPUI5 SDK)

entry.title: Re: Contact person does not update correct based on LINENUM
entry.content: Thank you for your reply. You are right, with CntctCode we can get unique code for contact person.

entry.title: Support unload Browser Event

entry.title: Change warning "cost center x locked for primary posting" to error

Hi,

Is anyone able to please advise how to change the warning message "cost center x locked for primary posting" to an error message?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: New customer story from Westwood
entry.content:
Hello Christoph,

good point, this could be made a bit more clear. For your information, Westwood is using the following:

- Product Marketability & Component Compliance > is in use

- Dangerous Goods Management > is in use

- Compliance Document Management;

     > SDS Distribution > is in use

     > SDS Generation > is required and will be used once available

     > Label Management > is required and will be used once available

The customer benefits already from the existing functionalities and is preparing to use the others as they become available.

Regards

Nadine

entry.title: New Standard Element of Company
entry.content:
Hi All,

Just wanting to know when will the Standard Element be available in Learning?

I have looked at out Entity Configuration or Connector Congfig so assume this is not available this release?

Regards

Vicki

entry.title: Re: How to delete migrated data from Staging tables in Fi...
entry.content:
Hi ,

The data which has been migrated successfully cannot be deleted using Migrate Your Data. Deleting instances on a non-modifiable system is not possible for security reasons.

If the data has been transferred to staging table and not been migrated, it can be deleted.

Kindly refer to this KBA for more details.

3538831 - Not able to delete successful migrated instances 

3318061 - Unable to delete instances from staging table 

Thanks and regards,
Latha

entry.title: Re: Mass processing of Business partners using MDC in Fiori (Part-2)
entry.content:
Hi Anirban,

could you please explain how the replication will be trigerred after the sucessful activation of Massprocessing? Is there any settings which we have to do in MDCIMG?

Regards,

Vasavi

entry.title: Integration of Microsoft teams with Group financial statement review booklet
entry.content:
Hi Team,

As per 2402 blog it says that there is integration of Microsoft teams with review booklet, but we are in 2502 starter system and cannot find the same and there are only 2 options i.e send email and save as a tile.

 

We have checked the authorisation also and all seems fine.

Request you to please let us know if anything is missing.

 

Thanks and Regards,

Vijay

entry.title: Re: Projected stock with IBP_CAGGR (current and future pe...
entry.content:
Hi @thomaskinder977 ,

 

Have a look at the standard key figure ACTUALSREVYTD in the Planning Area SAPIBP1 (Sample Model Entities app).

You don't use the CAGGR in the request level calculation itself, but rather in one of the subsequent levels. The request level should ideally be a SUM of your previous calculation (in this case, the CAGGR of current and future periods), which is the expected outcome.

entry.title: Re: While migrate SUPPLIER Master data template upload in...
entry.content:
Hi Veeru,

The issue occurs mainly because of the Outdated and /or corrupted file.

Kindly refer to the below KBA which provides more details to resolve the issue.

3540521 - Error "The activity failed because of an issue with job /1LT/MC*" in the Migration Cockpit 

Best regards,
Latha

entry.title: Re: Cross model copy from old model (Account base) to New...
entry.content:
Hi @9160ruby

Unfortunately, there is no single solution to migrate from the Old model to the New model for Local currency value.

Moonjun

entry.title: CDS deep level association - expose to service - problem
entry.content:
Hello i have 3 cds views and would like to expose the main view ZTEST_R1_ORD_MAIN as a service.
My aim is when the service is being executed to be able to return the data related to all items (view ZTEST_R1_ORD_VBAP) related to the root view and all schedule lines (view ZTEST_R1_ORD_VBEP) related to the items.
I.e. the structure is 3 levels deep:
ZTEST_R1_ORD_MAIN -> ZTEST_R1_ORD_VBAP -> ZTEST_R1_ORD_VBEP
and relations are performed via associations.
I export the root entity ZTEST_R1_ORD_MAIN via @odata.publlish:true

I perform tests via transaction /IWFND/GW_CLIENT.
I do have an access (via @expand=) to association which relates the 1st to the 2nd view (ZTEST_R1_ORD_MAIN -> ZTEST_R1_ORD_VBAP), i.e. association _item. And i can read the entries in _item association.
The problem is that i can NOT access association which relates 2nd to the 3rd view (ZTEST_R1_ORD_VBAP -> ZTEST_R1_ORD_VBEP), i.e. association: _schline. And i can NOT read the entities in _schline association.

I don't know if this is restriction of @odata.publish:true...
I have tried also with manually creating service and service binding - again without success.
Sap returns message like: _schline is not a recognizable object.

Here are the view definitions:

1st level view is exposed as a service via @odata.publish:true

@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@EndUserText.label: 'x'
@Metadata.ignorePropagatedAnnotations: true
define root view entity ztest_r1_ord_main as select from vbak
association [1..*] to ztest_r1_ord_vbap as _item on $projection.vbeln = _item.vbeln
{
    key vbeln,
    vkorg,    
     
     _item
}

 2nd level view

@AbapCatalog.viewEnhancementCategory: [#NONE]
@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@EndUserText.label: 'x'
@Metadata.ignorePropagatedAnnotations: true
@ObjectModel.usageType:{
    serviceQuality: #X,
    sizeCategory: #S,
    dataClass: #MIXED
}
define view entity ztest_r1_ord_vbap as select from vbap
association [1..*] to ztest_r1_ord_vbep as _schline on $projection.vbeln = _schline.vbeln and $projection.posnr = _schline.posnr

{
    key vbeln,
    key posnr,
    matnr,
    
    _schline    
}

3rd level view

@AbapCatalog.viewEnhancementCategory: [#NONE]
@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@EndUserText.label: 'VBEP'
@Metadata.ignorePropagatedAnnotations: true
@ObjectModel.usageType:{
    serviceQuality: #X,
    sizeCategory: #S,
    dataClass: #MIXED
}
define view entity ztest_r1_ord_vbep as select from vbep
{
    key vbeln,
    key posnr,
    key etenr,
    
     @Semantics.quantity.unitOfMeasure: 'vrkme'
    bmeng,
    vrkme    
}

Please, give me an advice how to solve this.

Please suggest a few ideas how we can achieve it in SAP Sales Cloud in Version 2.

Thank You in Advance.

entry.title: SAP Build Apps - Rest API config display issue
entry.content:
Hi, im just interested to know if this is a broader issue.  I noticed that i cannot click on any of the Rest API integrations and see their configuration. The firebase and OData ones work.  However my older REST API direct integration ones no longer allow me to click on them to update the configuration.   I noticed that there is a new format called "Universal REST API integration" which seems to work.   If i need to migrate my APIs to the new version - i cant set my configuration unfortunately.  Appreciate any help.

@Dan_Wroblewski  - wondering if the older API format is being depricated.

Old

New

entry.title: How to remove node "d:" and metadata from SAP Gateway response payload?
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

   i have a POST gateway service with create_deep_entity implemented.

   The SAP gateway response payload starts with "d:"  node.

{

    "d": {

        "__metadata": {

            "id": "https://xxxxxxxxxxxxxx/sap/opu/odata/sap/YMATR_SRV/HdrSet('')",

          }

          "MatDet" : {   ....  }

}

Instead i want the payload as below:

{

      "MatDet" : {   ....  }

}         

How to remove the metadata info from response paylaod as well the top node "d:" ?

I was able to remove metadata by enhancing the class below. Is this the correct way? However i can't figure out how can i remove the top node "d:".  Please help.

/IWCOR/CL_DS_EP_WRITER_JSON  and Method: WRITE_ENTITY_INTERNAL

Thanks

Gopal

entry.title: REST API as Source Connection
entry.content:
Hello,

I've seen quite a few pages on REST-API working with Datasphere, but most of them goe by a different way and are mostly used to enrich data.

We have a case that our software vendor only exposes their data with a REST-API, not even OData standard, just a plain call and json file back, all at once, no paging no metadata, ... Not the best, modern, way but we have to deal with it.

Now being quite new to DS and origination from the Azure-world with no SAP background is must say that at this moment its not clear to me what path I could try out to get that data into a data-flow and a local-table.

Has somebody done this already and what extra tools/setups do we need. We are running a SAP PCE/Private Cloud Edition, accessed by SCC/SAP Cloud Connector.

entry.title: KKAQ and Trial balance mismatch
entry.content:
Hii Team

When I execute the KKAQ report plant-wise (1000, 1001, 1002, 1003) and compare it with the working process under the trial balance based on profit center-wise data (plant and profit center are the same), I noticed the following:

  • For plants 1000 and 1001, the figures in the KKAQ report do not match the trial balance.

  • For plants 1002 and 1003, the figures are matching.

Could you please suggest how to check and identify the reason for the mismatch?

entry.title: Re: Multiple datasources for custom Adobe Form
entry.content:
Hi Jerry,

Pulling the data or generating the PDF itself isn't the issue, that works as expected. The challenge is generating the XSD data schema based on both the Service Definition (custom CDS view) and an external data source (Rest API).

The Service Definition seems to be the one and only supported entry point for the FDP services to generate the data schema. However, as long as that does not include the external data source, it contains only a fraction of the required data.

That's the bit I'm trying to figure out... can it be done, or should we be looking at a different approach altogether?

entry.title: 4H2 Selfbilling - Can we have more than 999 billing items in single invoice and accounting document?
entry.content:
Hello,

we are going to implement 4H2 Selfbilling in SAP Public Cloud solution and the client raised a question, whether this module is able to process 1500 billing items within the same SBI Transfer. I know, that the limitation of the S/4HANA system was 999 billing items in the invoice and relevant accounting documents.

Is it possible to have more then 999 billing items in SAP Public Cloud in single SBI Invoice and relevant accounting document? Is there some customization/development needed to make this work?

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: SAP Android SDK - offline odata - batch CUD operations
entry.content:
Thanks Robin,

I have implemented your solution. I worked with plenty of SDK version, and it's the first time I have to do it. I don't know why. (I'm working with the offline odata)

Anyway, I'm still facing an issue. When the user confirm an action, for example, i create a batchRequest and changeSet and put all the modifcations in it and i call the data sync just after that. It works if the sync is ok 

            val batchRequest = RequestBatch().
            val changeSet = ChangeSet()

            //update device in changeset
            changeSet.updateEntity(
                updatedDeviceEntity,
                HttpHeaders.empty,
                OfflineWorkerUtil.defautlRequestOptions
            )

            //update register's device in changeset
            updatedRegistersList.forEach { updatedRegister ->
                changeSet.updateEntity(
                    updatedRegister,
                    HttpHeaders.empty,
                    OfflineWorkerUtil.defautlRequestOptions
                )
            }

            //update MRU in changeset
            updatedMRU?.let { updateMRU ->
                changeSet.updateEntity(
                    updateMRU,
                    HttpHeaders.empty,
                    OfflineWorkerUtil.defautlRequestOptions
                )
            }

            batchRequest.addChanges(changeSet)
            api.processBatch(batchRequest)

But in the case, i haven't connectivity (i'm using offline odata), the second times, the same code is executed. (I also create a batchrequest and a changeSet). When, the sync is done, i only see 1 batch with only the first object in it. 

I can see in the offline provider, all the request queued. But, only the first is send to the backend.

Is someone have a clue on this behavior ? Is it a issue/bug ?

Thanks 

Yohann

SAP BTP SDK for Android SAP Mobile Services OData Android

entry.title: Re: Copy Table from query manager does not copy all the rows
entry.content:
Hi,

what @Johan_Hakkesteegt mentioned is the most likely culprit (special characters). Comparing data on both screens shows that the bottom row is the same, which means most likely all data was copied. But other than that, is there any reason why you are using this method instead of the built-in Export to Excel function?

BR,

Matija

entry.title: Link Solution Order with Project Item (linked existing project) for Billingcreation
entry.content:
Hi all, 

I am using the Solution Order with a Project Item. I link an existing project to the Solution Order Item. 

during billing createn via "Create Billing Documents" I would like to filter for the Solution Order and see all related Billing Document requests. Filtern works but I only see a value in the Solution Order column if I create a project through the Solution Order. If I link an existing project to a Solution Order, this field stays empty. 

Am I missingn something here? Do I have to run a job or something? 

Thanks for the support. 

BR,

Sorosch

entry.title: Re: How to Control the Visibility of CRUD and Custom Actions in Fiori Elements Based on Authorizatio
entry.content: Hi @MioYasutake nice blog! The @odata is missing at various positions, docu about singleton: https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/advanced/odata#singletons

entry.title: How to create an Analytical Report for "Receipts Not Invoiced" in SAP Ariba ?
entry.content:
I need to generate am analytical report in SAP Ariba that identifies receipts that have not been invoiced (i.e. goods received but no corresponding invoice).

What I've tried:

1. Used the Public Reports function with:

    * Fact One: "Receipts"

    * Fact Two: "Invoices" (to find a link to PO and/or Receipt ID)

    * Filter: invoice_ID is NULL

2. Included measured like Receipt Amount, Quantity Received

3. Export to Excel for further analysis

Issues/Questions:

1. Are there existing public report templates for this scenario that I can reuse?

2. Best way to calculate "Days uninvoiced" - should I use a custom formula in Ariba or post-export in Excel ?

3. Recommended filters (e.g. date range, supplier, po type) to optimize performance

Request:

If anyone has:

1. A prebuilt report template (JSON/shareable format)

2. Step-by-Step guidance for the pivot layout

3. Tips to automate/schedule this report

I'd greatly appreciate your insights.

Robert

entry.title: Account & requires a true account assignment relevant to cost accounting in bank statement items
entry.content:
Error KI248 Account & requires a true account assignment relevant to cost accounting is generated even after following instructions of kba 3113575 - Error message KI248 when posting a General Journal Entry we still get error in simulation of reprocessing of bank statement item 

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Account & requires a true account assignment relevant...
entry.content:
Check if item created before change.  This is stored in back processing app.  It is likely caused by the fact that this item was created before the mentioned changes.

If you add a Profitability Segment manually the simulation works as expected without any error.

If you try to create a new item for the same account then the automatic assignments to a profitability segment works as described in the KBA 3113575 - Error message KI248 when posting a General Journal Entry  and newly created item already assignment to a profitability segment. Then posting should work as expected.

entry.title: Re: Choosing the Right Analytical Tool: A Comprehensive Guide for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content: Excellent Blog...very informative...Thanks for sharing.

entry.title: Re: Missing Data in UPL
entry.content: The missing objects are methods and function modules. Below is the way the objects were executed.

entry.title: Re: Cross model copy from old model (Account base) to New...
entry.content:
Hi MoonJun,

 I have tried the workaround which you have propose but there seems to be decimal difference compare to the old Local Value. I have provided an numbers of old model as well as new .

 

Old modelLCGC
  149519.09940964.1363026
  9351.04452561.9299743
    
New LCAmount in GC
  149519.0989996040964.136302600
  9351.044499702561.92997430
    

 

Is there any possibility that SAC does backend some roundup and hence this is something came up. Request you to provide your opinion to tackle the same

 

Regards,

entry.title: Re: How to monitor SM13 in SAP Cloud ALM Health Monitorin...
entry.content:
Hello,

Let me provide additional insights, on top of the previous reply.

As already indicated, Health Monitoring is providing a set of high level indicators, and SM13 is currently not covered.
However, keep in mind that SAP Cloud ALM is composed of a series of so called use-cases (applications).
Even so, every use-case is concentrating on different monitoring aspects, you have some overlaps. This means you can typically also monitor further aspects of your ABAP system, using Integration & Exception Monitoring. 
Looking at the indicators, covered by Integration & Exception Monitoring, you will noticed that ABAP Update errors are supported by that use-case :
https://support.sap.com/en/alm/sap-cloud-alm/operations/expert-portal/integration-monitoring/int-mon-content.html

entry.title: Re: Missing Data in UPL
entry.content: The missing objects are methods and function modules. Below is the way the objects were executed. Tcode SM30 - Enter table name and click EDIT 2. At this point, the two FMs are already executed. Through a customized Tcode few methods are executed

Akash Agrawal

entry.title: Re: Can you import decimal values for competency?
entry.content:
Hello,

I enter the document ID and competency. The rating scale already accepts decimal, but upon import, I get an error of COMPETENCY: Invalid COMPETENCY rating 3.4 for document Id #####

entry.title: Re: How to add a Excel-File to an existing Dataset (UNION)
entry.content: Dear William, it took me a while. However, thanks to your fast replies I finally solved the problem. Thanks a lot!!!

entry.title: Re: Exited with status 137 (out of memory), reason: CRASHED
entry.content: Have a look at the documentation here: https://help.sap.com/docs/btp/sap-business-technology-platform/customizing-java-virtual-machine-jvm-settings to look at various options. Last resort is to increase the RAM allocation to the application.

entry.title: Re: "Script Task" are now available in SAP Build Process Automation.
entry.content:
Hmmm.... Just Idea

 

I believe that I can build it by using Control’s "Condition" and "GotoStep".
In some cases, it may be necessary to prepare a custom variable as a counter and increment it by +1 in a script task. When thinking in terms of pro-code, please consider constructing a loop not with a "FOR" statement, but by using "IF-THEN" and "GOTO".

Regards,

entry.title: Re: Use inbound service in BAdi to update the purchase or...
entry.content:
Unfortunately, there is no direct way to update the Purchase Order Net Price using standard SAP functionality or BAdIs in S/4HANA Cloud. Here are the key points:

  1. The BAdI MM_PUR_S4_PO_MODIFY_ITEM does not allow changing the Net Price Amount value .

  2. There is no specific BAdI to directly modify the net price of a purchase order .

  3. For controlling the price determination process when creating or changing a purchase order, you can use the BAdI MM_PUR_S4_PO_DEFINE_CNDNCTRL . However, this does not directly allow updating an existing net price.

  4. The inbound service you mentioned (SAP_COM_0053) is for Purchase Order Integration, but it doesn't provide a direct method to update the net price .

As an alternative approach, you could consider:

  1. Using the BAdI MM_PUR_S4_PO_DEFINE_CNDNCTRL to influence the price determination process for new or changed purchase orders .

  2. Exploring if there are any APIs or services available within your SAP S/4HANA Cloud system that might allow updating PO prices indirectly.

  3. If direct modification is absolutely necessary, you may need to contact SAP support for a custom solution or explore if there are any extension points available in your specific SAP S/4HANA Cloud implementation.

Remember that modifying prices directly can have significant implications on financial processes and data integrity, so any changes should be carefully considered and implemented with proper controls and approvals.

entry.title: Re: Function Module in Variant Configuration
entry.content:
Dear Ashish Mishra,

Try using the Restrictable characteristics dependency.
Check out the below SAP help portal for more information.
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/a73402f511734e6eac56063e631bf24e/8063b6531de6b64ce10000000a174cb4.html

Hope this helps!!!

Best Regards,
Surya.

entry.title: Re: Create one Purchase order out of each Sales order usi...
entry.content:
Hello Chuma,

Thanks a lot for your answer. I had a lot of tests after your comment and 100% confirm what you said. Thanks a lot for your answer! 🙂 

kind regards, 

Philipp

entry.title: Hide tab Collect PR indicator in CJ20N (SAP Project Systems:Project builder)
entry.content:
Hello Community,

If you come across a customer requirement to hide the collect PR indicator tab from project definition level in CJ20N then here is a simple & standard solution.

           1)Execute transaction SE18

           2)Select Radio Button "Enhancement spot"

           3)Enter name: "ES_SAPLCJWB_PS1"

           4)Click on Create

           5)In the next pop-up enter short-text: "EhP3 Enhancement to Hide Collective PR Tab"

           6)Select Technology: "BAdi Definition" and Composite Enhancement Spot: "ESC_CN_PSP_OPR_PS"

           7)Click on OK

           8)Assign to package: "PS_ST_EHP3_SFWS_SC"

           9)Under the tree-control for BAdi definitions click on NEW

           10)Enter name: "BADI_PS_COLLPR_ENH" and Short Description: "BAdi Definition to Hide Collective PR Tab"

           11)Expand the above BAdi definition node and double click on Interface

           12)On the right side screen enter interface name: "IF_BADI_PS_COLLPR_ENH" and click on EDIT

           13)In the create confirmation pop-up click on YES

           14)Assign the interface to package: "PS_ST_EHP3_SFWS_SC"

           15)In the save confirmation pop-up click on YES

           16)Under the Methods tab in the interface create an instance method by name: "HIDE_TAB"

           17)Select the above method and click on the button: "PARAMETERS"

           18)Create an Importing, Optional parameter I_PSPNR of type PS_INTNR and another Changing, Mandatory parameter C_HIDE of type FLAG

           19)Save the Interface

           20)Go back to Enhancement Spot screen and Activate it along with the BAdi definition, the interface and the composite enhancement spot

These steps are relevant for both SAP ECC and S/4HANA systems.

For detailed information, please refer to KBA https://me.sap.com/notes/2215903/E

Regards

Shubham Srivastava

entry.title: Re: SQLITE_CONSTRAINT: UNIQUE constraint failed error during CAP Tutorial Execution
entry.content:
Hi Mainak,

It seems in you entity key value are duplicating for AuthorID in Book entity.

Just changed the key value by adding some random number at end any try? it may work.

 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Bem vindos a Comunidade SAP de Londrina!
entry.content:
Fala pessoal .... prazer fazer parte desta comunidade ... sou Elton Mello ... sou de Londrina e estou caminhando com SAP desde 1997 ... aliás foi em Londrina meu primeiro contato com SAP, o que me despertou o interesse em seguir no mundo SAP.

Sou instrutor e coordenador de Treinamentos na Creative-TI.

Fico totalmente à disposição da comunidade.

Quem sabe possamos juntos desenvolver eventos e ações que promovam o crescimento e o engajamento desta comunidade SAP Pé Vermelho.

Um grande abr. a todos.

entry.title: Re: Overcoming Challenges in Staffing Customer Projects with SAP Project and Resource Management
entry.content:
Thank you for the blog. But i have 2 queries here.

1. If demand is raised for 100 hours, still we are allowed to over staff. is there any option to restrict based on requested hours in demand.

2. the demand, and staffing hours should be done as per availability hours for each month and for each resource. eg: if we assign availability hours as 186 h for a resource then staffing for each month should be based on availability hours. is there a way to make that.

It will be helpful, if i have your input.
